name: Last Respects
short_description: Last Respects is a short, single player indie horror game where the player must solve an unexplained murder case and banish a demonic presence.
detailed_description:
Last Respects is a short, single player indie horror game where players assume the role of a detective, haunted by a recent murder case that defies explanation.

- Investigate the crime scene, collect evidence, and unravel the victim’s tragic story. The more you uncover, the stronger the malevolent presence becomes.

- To save your sanity and cleanse the house, perform rituals by burning items found throughout the mansion
about_the_game:
